healthcare.title: Healthcare Industries
healthcare.subtitle: Trusted technology partner for life sciences and health systems
healthcare.intro: Heritage InfoTech delivers HIPAA-compliant integration, clinical data platforms, AI-driven diagnostics support, and enterprise security for the nation's leading healthcare and pharmaceutical organizations.

clients.name: Pfizer
clients.summary: Global pharmaceutical leader partnering with Heritage on clinical data integration and secure research informatics.

projects.description: Deployed ML pipelines for clinical trial data normalization and adverse event pattern detection across multi-site research programs.
Built HL7 FHIR-compliant integration layer connecting laboratory information systems with enterprise data warehouses.
Designed governed data lake architecture for real-world evidence analytics with full lineage and audit trail capabilities.
Implemented GxP-validated access controls, encryption at rest and in transit, and continuous HIPAA compliance monitoring.

clients.name: Cleveland Clinic
clients.summary: World-renowned academic medical center leveraging Heritage for patient engagement platforms and clinical workflow automation.

projects.description: Developed predictive readmission models integrated with Epic EHR workflows to support care coordination teams.
Connected ambulatory scheduling, revenue cycle, and telehealth platforms through an enterprise service bus architecture.
Established master patient index and clinical data repository supporting population health analytics initiatives.
Conducted zero-trust network segmentation for clinical IoT devices and medical imaging systems.

clients.name: University Hospitals
clients.summary: Northeast Ohio health system engaging Heritage for ERP modernization and workforce technology solutions.

projects.description: Piloted intelligent document processing for prior authorization workflows reducing manual review time by 40%.
Integrated supply chain, HR, and finance systems following cloud ERP migration to Microsoft Dynamics.
Built operational dashboards aggregating bed management, staffing, and throughput metrics in real time.
Deployed identity governance and privileged access management aligned with HITRUST CSF requirements.

clients.name: Mayo Clinic
clients.summary: Premier integrated medical practice and research group supported by Heritage on research data platforms and secure collaboration tools.

projects.description: Supported federated learning infrastructure enabling multi-institutional research without centralizing protected health data.
Architected API gateway connecting research registries, biobank systems, and genomic analysis platforms.
Implemented metadata catalog and data quality framework for precision medicine research datasets.
Established quantum-readiness assessment for long-term research archive cryptographic protocols.

clients.name: Johns Hopkins Medicine
clients.summary: Academic medical enterprise partnering on clinical informatics staffing and secure cloud infrastructure programs.

projects.description: Staffed and supported NLP engineering team building clinical note extraction for quality measure reporting.
Delivered interoperability solutions connecting inpatient and ambulatory EHR instances across the health system.
Supported enterprise data mesh initiative for research, clinical, and operational data domains.
Performed cryptographic inventory and hybrid PQC roadmap for research data encryption standards.

financial.title: Financial Services
financial.subtitle: Technology excellence for banking, asset management, and insurance
financial.intro: Heritage InfoTech supports financial institutions with regulatory-compliant integrations, core banking modernization, wealth management platforms, and enterprise-grade security programs.

clients.name: Flagstar Bank
clients.summary: One of the largest regional banks in the United States (formerly New York Community Bancorp), engaging Heritage for core integration and digital banking programs.

projects.description: Implemented fraud detection models for real-time transaction monitoring across retail and commercial banking channels.
Integrated loan origination, core banking, and CRM platforms during post-merger systems consolidation.
Built regulatory reporting data pipeline supporting CECL, BSA/AML, and FDIC call report automation.
Deployed SOX-aligned access controls and continuous vulnerability management for internet-facing banking applications.

clients.name: Fidelity Investments
clients.summary: Global financial services leader partnering with Heritage on wealth management technology and data platform engineering.

projects.description: Supported robo-advisory algorithm development and portfolio optimization model validation frameworks.
Connected retirement plan administration, trading, and client portal systems through event-driven architecture.
Designed customer 360 data platform unifying brokerage, retirement, and wealth management client records.
Executed cryptographic discovery program assessing quantum risk across certificate and key management infrastructure.

clients.name: The Hartford
clients.summary: Fortune 500 insurance and financial services company leveraging Heritage for group benefits technology and BPO operations.

projects.description: Developed claims triage automation reducing manual processing for group disability and workers compensation lines.
Integrated policy administration, billing, and employer portal systems for group benefits product lines.
Established actuarial data mart supporting pricing models and loss ratio analytics across commercial lines.
Implemented data loss prevention and encryption standards meeting NAIC insurance data security model requirements.

clients.name: Deloitte
clients.summary: Global professional services firm engaging Heritage as a specialized delivery partner for client technology transformation programs.

projects.description: Provided specialized AI engineering teams for client-facing intelligent automation and document intelligence engagements.
Delivered integration architects for multi-year ERP and CRM transformation programs across financial services clients.
Staffed cloud data engineers for enterprise data platform migrations on Azure and AWS for audit and advisory clients.
Supported cyber risk assessment and quantum readiness consulting workstreams for regulated industry clients.

technology.title: Technology
technology.subtitle: Powering innovation for software, cloud, and digital enterprises
technology.intro: Heritage InfoTech provides elite technology talent, cloud architecture, and product engineering support to leading software companies and digital transformation initiatives.

clients.name: Microsoft
clients.summary: Strategic technology partner engaging Heritage for Azure implementation specialists and enterprise solution architects.

projects.description: Staffed Azure ML engineers for customer copilot and cognitive services implementation projects.
Delivered Power Platform and Dynamics 365 integration specialists for enterprise client deployments.
Provided Synapse and Fabric data engineers for enterprise analytics modernization programs.
Supported zero-trust architecture implementations using Microsoft Entra and Defender suite.

clients.name: Salesforce
clients.summary: CRM platform leader supported by Heritage-certified developers and integration architects.

projects.description: Implemented Einstein Analytics and AI-driven lead scoring for financial services customer deployments.
Built MuleSoft API layers connecting Salesforce with legacy policy and banking core systems.
Designed Customer Data Platform architecture with unified identity resolution across B2B and B2C channels.
Configured shield platform encryption and event monitoring for healthcare and insurance clients.

clients.name: Oracle
clients.summary: Enterprise software giant partnering on ERP, database, and cloud infrastructure staffing programs.

projects.description: Supported Oracle AI Vector Search implementations for enterprise knowledge management use cases.
Delivered OIC integration specialists for cloud ERP and SCM migration programs.
Staffed database administrators and Exadata engineers for mission-critical OLTP and warehouse environments.
Implemented database vault and unified auditing for PCI-DSS regulated payment processing environments.

logistics.title: Logistics & Supply Chain
logistics.subtitle: Optimizing fleet, distribution, and field operations at scale
logistics.intro: Heritage InfoTech's Logistics Solutions Suite and supply chain technology practice help transportation, distribution, and energy companies maximize fleet utilization and operational efficiency.

clients.name: Ryder System
clients.summary: Fortune 500 transportation and logistics leader using Heritage route planning and fleet management solutions.

projects.description: Deployed demand forecasting models optimizing fleet allocation across dedicated transportation contracts.
Integrated TMS, WMS, and telematics platforms enabling real-time shipment visibility for enterprise customers.
Built fleet performance data warehouse supporting fuel efficiency, driver safety, and asset utilization KPIs.
Secured IoT telematics data streams with end-to-end encryption and DOT compliance audit logging.

clients.name: AmeriGas
clients.summary: Nation's largest propane distributor leveraging Heritage mobile resource management and route optimization tools.

projects.description: Implemented dynamic route optimization using weather, demand, and tank-level sensor data for delivery scheduling.
Connected field service mobile apps with ERP, billing, and customer notification systems.
Established IoT data pipeline ingesting tank monitor readings from 1.5 million customer locations.
Deployed mobile device management and secure VPN architecture for 4,000+ field delivery technicians.

clients.name: FedEx Supply Chain
clients.summary: Global third-party logistics provider supported by Heritage on warehouse technology and integration programs.

projects.description: Supported computer vision pilot for warehouse inventory scanning and automated cycle count validation.
Built EDI and API integration layer connecting WMS with client order management and carrier systems.
Designed supply chain control tower dashboards aggregating inbound, inventory, and outbound metrics.
Implemented partner API security gateway with OAuth 2.0, rate limiting, and threat detection.

government.title: Government
government.subtitle: Secure, compliant technology for state and municipal agencies
government.intro: Heritage InfoTech delivers mission-critical systems modernization, revenue platform engineering, and cybersecurity programs for state cabinets, port authorities, and public sector organizations.

clients.name: Kentucky Department of Revenue
clients.summary: Cabinet agency of the Commonwealth of Kentucky responsible for tax administration, engaging Heritage for tax systems modernization and secure citizen services platforms.

projects.description: Developed anomaly detection models identifying fraudulent tax return patterns while preserving taxpayer privacy.
Modernized integrations between tax processing, motor vehicle, and treasury disbursement systems.
Built revenue analytics platform supporting policy analysis, collection forecasting, and audit case management.
Achieved FedRAMP-aligned security controls for citizen-facing web applications and API services.

clients.name: Port Authority of NY & NJ
clients.summary: Bi-state port authority partnering on airport and tunnel infrastructure technology and cybersecurity programs.

projects.description: Piloted predictive maintenance analytics for tunnel ventilation and airport baggage handling systems.
Integrated facility management, access control, and emergency notification systems across multi-site operations.
Established operational data hub consolidating passenger throughput, asset maintenance, and security event data.
Led quantum readiness cryptographic assessment for critical infrastructure OT/IT convergence environments.

clients.name: State of Ohio IT
clients.summary: State government technology agency supported by Heritage on shared services and workforce staffing programs.

projects.description: Supported chatbot and virtual assistant deployment for citizen services portal reducing call center volume.
Delivered integration middleware connecting Medicaid, unemployment, and licensing agency systems.
Built statewide data sharing framework enabling cross-agency analytics while enforcing data governance policies.
Implemented statewide identity and access management with multi-factor authentication for 50,000+ state employees.

manufacturing.title: Manufacturing
manufacturing.subtitle: Digital transformation for global industrial and automotive leaders
manufacturing.intro: Heritage InfoTech partners with world-class manufacturers to deliver ERP modernization, IoT integration, supply chain analytics, and workforce technology programs that drive operational excellence on the factory floor and across the enterprise.

clients.name: BMW Group
clients.summary: Global automotive manufacturer engaging Heritage for connected vehicle platforms, manufacturing execution systems, and Industry 4.0 initiatives.

projects.description: Developed predictive quality analytics for assembly line defect detection using sensor fusion and computer vision models.
Integrated MES, SAP S/4HANA, and supplier portal systems across North American production facilities.
Built manufacturing data lake aggregating OT and IT telemetry for real-time OEE dashboards and supply chain visibility.
Implemented zero-trust OT security architecture for connected factory floor and robotics control systems.

clients.name: Parker Hannifin
clients.summary: Fortune 250 motion and control technologies leader partnering with Heritage on global ERP harmonization and engineering workforce programs.

projects.description: Deployed demand sensing models optimizing inventory and production scheduling across diversified industrial product lines.
Connected engineering PLM, CRM, and Oracle ERP systems supporting the Win Strategy operating model.
Established enterprise analytics platform unifying financial, operational, and customer data across 40+ divisional business units.
Led IT/OT convergence security assessment and hybrid PQC readiness for intellectual property and design data protection.
